diskripr

CLI Reference

diskripr

diskripr — Rip DVDs to a Jellyfin-compatible library.

Usage

diskripr [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

Options

--version

Show the version and exit.

organize

Organize already-ripped MKVs from the temp directory into Jellyfin tree.

Reads temp dir from DISKRIPR_TEMP_DIR or <output-dir>/.tmp/.tmp. The largest file is treated as the main feature; all others become extras.

Usage

diskripr organize [OPTIONS]

Options

-n, --name <movie_name>

Required Movie title for Jellyfin naming.

-y, --year <movie_year>

Required Movie release year.

-o, --output-dir <output_dir>

Base output directory.

Default:

'dvd_output'

-d, --device <device>

Optical drive block device.

Default:

'/dev/sr0'

--disc <N>

Disc number for multi-disc movies (1, 2, …).

--keep-original

Preserve pre-encode MKVs in an originals/ subdirectory.

--eject, --no-eject

Eject disc when finished.

Default:

True

rip

Rip a DVD through the full pipeline into the Jellyfin library.

Usage

diskripr rip [OPTIONS]

Options

-n, --name <movie_name>

Required Movie title for Jellyfin naming.

-y, --year <movie_year>

Required Movie release year.

-o, --output-dir <output_dir>

Base output directory.

Default:

'dvd_output'

-d, --device <device>

Optical drive block device.

Default:

'/dev/sr0'

--disc <N>

Disc number for multi-disc movies (1, 2, …).

--keep-original

Preserve pre-encode MKVs in an originals/ subdirectory.

--eject, --no-eject

Eject disc when finished.

Default:

True

--rip-mode <rip_mode>

Title selection: main (longest), all, or ask (interactive).

Default:

'main'

Options:

main | all | ask

--encode <encode_format>

Encoding format, or ‘ask’ to choose interactively.

Default:

'none'

Options:

none | h264 | h265 | ask

--quality <quality>

HandBrake RF quality (0–51). Defaults to 20 (h264) or 22 (h265).

--min-length <min_length>

Minimum title duration in seconds.

Default:

30

scan

Scan the disc and list available titles without ripping.

Usage

diskripr scan [OPTIONS]

Options

-d, --device <device>

Optical drive block device.

Default:

'/dev/sr0'

--min-length <min_length>

Minimum title duration in seconds.

Default:

30
